topics.title: Engagement Party Recap
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent engagement party, the quality of Artie Lange's public speaking, and various personal anecdotes regarding dating and phone technology.

topics.title: Promotional Tour for Howard TV
topics.summary: The studio discusses a promotional tour featuring an ice cream truck converted into a mobile viewing booth for Howard TV content in several cities.

topics.title: Analysis of an Engagement Toast
topics.summary: The studio critiques the phrasing and delivery of a past engagement speech, debating whether the remarks were intended as sincere compliments or came across as self-centered.

topics.title: Engagement Party Anecdotes and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses humorous incidents from a recent engagement party, including intoxicated guests and standout speeches, before transitioning to a critique of a 60 Minutes segment regarding crime and community loyalty.

topics.title: Gun Violence and Community Safety
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of gun laws, the impact of mental illness on public safety, and the lack of cooperation from witnesses in high-profile crimes.

topics.title: Radio Industry Trends and Advertising Strategies
topics.summary: The studio discusses the significant impact of Howard Stern's presence on radio revenue, the failure of subtle advertising experiments in commercial-free formats, and the challenges facing traditional radio against digital competition.

topics.title: Alec Baldwin and Kim Basinger Divorce Dispute
topics.summary: The studio discusses the public fallout of a heated voicemail left by Alec Baldwin for his daughter and criticizes the ongoing legal and personal battle between him and Kim Basinger.

topics.title: Alec Baldwin Parenting Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses Alec Baldwin's public outburst toward his daughter, debating the boundaries of parental discipline and the impact of his verbal behavior.

topics.title: Parental Conflict and Pornography Career
topics.summary: The studio discusses the emotional fallout of a father's public outburst during a divorce, followed by an interview with adult film star Hillary Scott regarding her career milestones and performance style.

topics.title: Adult Film Star Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with adult film star Hillary Scott regarding her career, personal experiences, and specific scenes from her films.

topics.title: Adult Film Performance and Equipment Demonstration
topics.summary: The studio features a guest performer who discusses her experiences in the adult film industry while demonstrating a mechanical device.

topics.title: Adult Film Star Interview and Radio Industry Analysis
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with adult film star Hillary Scott regarding her career, personal life, and education before transitioning into a discussion on the impact of satellite radio on traditional terrestrial broadcasting.

topics.title: Weight Loss Contest and Baseball Discussion
topics.summary: The studio monitors the progress of several participants in a weight-loss competition before transitioning to a discussion on baseball records and a guest's comments regarding substance use.

topics.title: Artie's Mental Health and Professional Responsibility
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie's struggles with depression, the impact of his public persona on his personal life, and the boundaries of professional responsibility regarding his well-being.

topics.title: Substance Abuse and Personal Struggles
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of addiction recovery, personal health goals, and the importance of seeking help before reaching rock bottom.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Social Issues
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the release of a book about Princess Diana, the public appearance of reality star Sanjaya, reports on an integrated high school prom, and discussions regarding racial insensitivity.

topics.title: Current Events and Comedy News
topics.summary: The studio covers topics ranging from the ethics of offensive jokes and reports on Al-Qaeda's activities to updates on the Iraq War, a tragic shooting at Virginia Tech, an air show crash, rising gas prices, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
